audit_items.proof_trace: All P2P messages from external peers undergo full validation including BLS signature verification before acceptance. Self-messages (line 47-48) bypass validation but rely on libp2p's cryptographic peer identity which cannot be spoofed without the node's private key. Blocks validate via validateBeaconBlock (line 214→296) and attestations via validateUnaggregatedAttWithState (line 315).
